examples: The body is made of mineral-reinforced thermoplastic.
They manufacture the class of plastics known as thermoplastic materials.
Doors open with high impact thermoplastic handles.
Taking its cues from computer-aided-design software, an extruder stacks thin layers of gooey thermoplastic that cure into shape.
The Mazda5's dashboard utterly tests one's appetite for molded thermoplastic, but it has the virtue of being well-organized and intuitive.
